restart_reason: PreCompact hook requested a context capsule draft.

commands_run.command: git diff -- src/effectiveness/treatment-generic-refactor-runner.ts scripts/effectiveness/types.ts tests/effectiveness/treatment-generic-refactor-runner.test.ts tests/effectiveness/m12-release-gate.test.ts docs/LOOP_PROGRESS.md docs/M12_EFFECTIVENESS_EVALUATION.md docs/M12_RELEASE_GATES.md docs/DECISIONS.md evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/refactor-evaluator-artifact-triage.json evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/RefactorEvaluatorArtifactTriageReport.md

git status --short src/effectiveness/treatment-generic-refactor-runner.ts scripts/effectiveness/types.ts tests/effectiveness/treatment-generic-refactor-runner.test.ts tests/effectiveness/m12-release-gate.test.ts docs/LOOP_PROGRESS.md docs/M12_EFFECTIVENESS_EVALUATION.md docs/M12_RELEASE_GATES.md docs/DECISIONS.md evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/refactor-evaluator-artifact-triage.json evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/RefactorEvaluatorArtifactTriageReport.md evals/effectiveness/reports/m12-mini-compare.json evals/effectiveness/reports/M12_Mini_Report.md evals/effectiveness/reports/m12-release-gate.json evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/evidence-freshness-check.json evals/effectiveness/reports/refactor-small-001/EvidenceFreshnessCheckReport.md

find evidence/m12-test-coverage-001-canary-pass -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,80p' && printf '
--- summary json ---
' && cat evals/effectiveness/reports/test-coverage-001/canary-pass-summary.json && printf '
--- summary md ---
' && sed -n '1,180p' evals/effectiveness/reports/test-coverage-001/CanaryPassSummary.md
test -d evals/effectiveness/fixtures/feature-small-002; printf 'fixture_dir_exists=%s\n' "$?"; find evals/effectiveness/fixtures -maxdepth 2 -type d | sort | sed -n '1,80p'
test -e evidence/m12-refactor-small-001-canary-pass; printf 'evidence_exists=%s\n' "$?"; find evidence/m12-refactor-small-001-canary-pass -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | sed -n '1,80p'

next_instruction: Continue M1 from docs/LOOP_PROGRESS.md and latest events.
do_not_repeat: Do not rely on chat history as the only source of truth.
Do not enter the next module unless explicitly requested.
